task: I’ve got a file review coming up that will be checked against branch records, and I want to make sure the packet is in order before it goes out. Can you help me build a simple checklist for what to verify and what to flag if anything looks incomplete?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — use a simple **in-order file check**.

## 1) Identity
- client name matches
- CIF/account/file number matches
- product or request type matches the packet
- dates are current

## 2) Numbers
- amount matches
- rate matches
- term matches
- payment matches
- any key figures line up across docs

## 3) Documents
- required forms are included
- no missing pages
- no stale version of the form
- supporting docs are attached if needed

## 4) Signatures / approvals
- signatures are present
- initials are present where needed
- dates are filled in
- required approvals are in place

## 5) Compliance items
- disclosures are included
- exceptions are documented
- ID docs are in place if needed
- income docs are in place if needed
- any special notes are written clearly

## 6) Final package check
- packet is in the right order
- nothing is loose or out of sequence
- it’s going to the right person or queue
- nothing is incomplete or unclear

## Flag it if you see
- mismatch in name, number, or product
- missing signature, date, or initial
- stale form or wrong version
- missing required disclosure or approval
- missing ID or income doc where applicable
- exception not documented
- packet not in the right order

## Stop and fix
If anything is missing, mismatched, or unclear, **stop and fix it before the packet goes out**.

If you want, I can turn this into a one-page desk checklist with checkboxes.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that works. Clean enough to use.

I’d probably keep it like this on my desk:

- identity matches
- numbers match across docs
- required forms are there
- no missing pages
- signatures/initials/dates are complete
- disclosures are included
- approvals are in place
- exceptions are noted
- supporting docs are attached
- packet is in the right order
- nothing stale or out of version

Flag it hard if:
- any mismatch on name, file/account number, amount, rate, term
- missing signature, date, or approval
- wrong form version
- missing disclosure
- missing ID/income doc when it should be there
- exception not explained
- packet looks incomplete or out of sequence

If it’s not clean, stop it before it goes out. Don’t let sloppy files become your problem later.
